title: Scape and Run: Cotesia Glomerata Russificator
description: The first Russian translation of the SRP Addon: Cotesia Glomerata
body:
# About:
### Russian translation of the Scape & Run Addon: Cotesia Glomerata.

This translation into Russian includes: Translation of items, of possible mobs, of mechanics, full translation of Patchouli Book.


_Although the translation has been completed, it has not yet been processed, so it will be updated over time._
_If you find any grammatical errors in the translation, or can suggest improvements to the translation, please contact me._
